decisions.title: Plugins in `.claude/skills` auto-load (no marketplace) — could eliminate the activation gap
`/reload-skills` — lighter alternative to `/reload-plugins` for skills-only updates
`/fewer-permission-prompts` bundled skill — auto-generate allowed-tools allowlist
decisions.note: Added a 'Reducing permission prompts' subsection to workflow.md Tips & Best Practices recommending the built-in /fewer-permission-prompts as first diagnostic, with the fix-allowed-tools-for-the-long-term caveat.

decisions.title: Enforce /bx:health read-only invariant via `disallowed-tools` frontmatter (v2.1.152)
decisions.note: User-directed registration after first dogfood run: per-skill opportunity surfaced outside the pain-point gate. Proposed: add `disallowed-tools: Edit, Write, Task` to bx/skills/health/SKILL.md frontmatter.

decisions.title: Declare `stitch-skills` as a plugin dependency in bx plugin.json (v2.1.143 dependency enforcement)
decisions.note: User-directed registration. CAVEAT verified against release notes: v2.1.143 enforcement is enable/disable-time only (`plugin disable` refuses when depended-on; `plugin enable` force-enables transitive deps) — install-time resolution NOT confirmed; check code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference before applying.

decisions.title: Stop-hook `additionalContext` could automate the end-of-session /bx:save reminder (v2.1.163)
decisions.note: User-directed registration. Stop/SubagentStop hooks can return hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext without being labeled a hook error — a Stop hook in bx/hooks/hooks.json could inject the '/bx:save before you go' reminder that workflow.md currently leaves to convention.

decisions.title: `Skill(name *)` wildcard prefix-match fixed (v2.1.139) — unblocks the Skill(bx-*)→Skill(bx:*) settings migration
decisions.note: User-directed registration. NOTE: changelog lane's digest also attributed this fix to v2.1.145 — verified against release bodies, it ships in v2.1.139 only. Also: .claude/settings.local.json is absent in this clone, so the migration may be moot — verify ~/.claude/settings.json on this machine before applying.

decisions.title: SessionStart `CLAUDE_ENV_FILE` — persist env vars to all Bash calls (addresses no-env-var-persistence)
decisions.note: Added CLAUDE_ENV_FILE blocks to session-start-context.sh + .ps1 persisting PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 + PYTHONUTF8=1 session-wide (guarded no-op when unset); updated both scripts' read-only design-rule comments. Smoke-check next session before retiring per-call UTF-8 prefixes in /bx:seo.

decisions.title: Task tool renamed to Agent (v2.1.63, alias retained) — bx frontmatter and prose still say Task
decisions.note: Renamed bare `Task` to `Agent` in allowed-tools of 7 SKILL.md files (arch/clean/evolve/save/seo/tests/webdesign — webdesign + save/references/mode-update.md were orchestrator completeness catches beyond the lane's list) and updated tool-name prose in 5 skill bodies + README.md. TaskCreate/TaskList/TaskGet/TaskUpdate (task-tracker tools) deliberately untouched.
